targets.query:
from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "load_1m")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "mem_used_pct")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "disk_used_pct")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "temp_c")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "disk_free_gb")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and (r._field == "load_1m" or r._field == "load_5m" or r._field == "load_15m"))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "mem_used_pct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "temp_c")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Service Status
panels.description: Last time each NetMon collector wrote data. Rows older than 5 min suggest the collector is unhealthy.

targets.query:
ping        = from(bucket: "netmon") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ping"           and r._field == "rtt_avg")    |> group() |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({service: "Ping Monitor",   last_seen: r._time})) |> keep(columns: ["service", "last_seen"])
ipcheck     = from(bucket: "netmon") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "public_ip"      and r._field == "ip")         |> group() |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({service: "IP Checker",     last_seen: r._time})) |> keep(columns: ["service", "last_seen"])
wifi_sta    = from(bucket: "netmon") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_station"   and r._field == "signal_dbm") |> group() |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({service: "WiFi Station",   last_seen: r._time})) |> keep(columns: ["service", "last_seen"])
wifi_scan   = from(bucket: "netmon") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_scan_ap"   and r._field == "signal_dbm") |> group() |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({service: "WiFi Scanner",   last_seen: r._time})) |> keep(columns: ["service", "last_seen"])
syslog      = from(bucket: "netmon") |> range(start: -24h)|> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "syslog_event"   and r._field == "message")    |> group() |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({service: "Syslog Parser",  last_seen: r._time})) |> keep(columns: ["service", "last_seen"])
router      = from(bucket: "netmon") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "router_wan"     and r._field == "port1_up")   |> group() |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({service: "Router Monitor", last_seen: r._time})) |> keep(columns: ["service", "last_seen"])
sys         = from(bucket: "netmon") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system"         and r._field == "temp_c")     |> group() |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({service: "System Metrics", last_seen: r._time})) |> keep(columns: ["service", "last_seen"])
speedtest   = from(bucket: "netmon_speedtest") |> range(start: -2h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "speedtest" and r._field == "download_mbps") |> group() |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({service: "Speedtest",      last_seen: r._time})) |> keep(columns: ["service", "last_seen"])
iperf3      = from(bucket: "netmon_speedtest") |> range(start: -7d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iperf3"    and r._field == "send_mbps")     |> group() |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({service: "iperf3 Sim",     last_seen: r._time})) |> keep(columns: ["service", "last_seen"])

union(tables: [ping, ipcheck, wifi_sta, wifi_scan, syslog, router, sys, speedtest, iperf3])
